$comment: Single source of truth for the coordinated release. The npm packages all publish at `version` (sync mode — see RELEASING.md). The model identity (which trained artifact + tokenizer the neural-weights-* packages bundle) lives under `weights`, decoupled from the artifact's historical filename. Paths are relative to `weights.dataRoot` (override the root with MAILWOMAN_DATA_ROOT, or the individual files with MAILWOMAN_PUBLISH_MODEL / MAILWOMAN_PUBLISH_TOKENIZER). Bump `version` here in lockstep with the release; copy-weights.ts, the ship script, and the model card all read this instead of hardcoding the numbers.

weights.lineage: v3.1.0-fr-fragment — v310 (#1143 T2). init_from v264 + ONE variable: the `synth-fr-fragment` BAN shard @ 12.0 (144,865 rows, Licence Ouverte, 0 eval surfaces). Teaches that a street name is a street name WITHOUT a house number — the model had learned digits as the licence for the street reading. FR fragment board: bare-street 0.215→0.715, street-particle 0.273→0.855, admin-street-homonym 0.087→0.517; the bare-locality counter-guard held EXACTLY (0.980→0.980, same interval) and both contextful guards improved (+2.3pp, +3.5pp). Global parity street 0.577→0.6067 (+8 fixtures), house_number + postcode byte-identical. v6.0.0-shipped-baseline gate 18/18. No trade measured. (The v320 span-head composition was the pre-registered follow-up: it FAILED −3.2pp against this model's own plain decode and is closed.) | 6.6.1 (2026-07-24): model bytes UNCHANGED; en-gb pair-index re-cut δ=10 (Option-A sweep) + neural 7.7.0 auto probe chain — GB dependent_locality live on the shipped v385.

softFeed.$comment: Soft-feed artifacts (#718 D1) materialized into each neural-weights-<locale> workspace at publish time by copy-weights.ts so the library default `loadFromWeights` feeds the channels the anchor+gazetteer-trained model expects (closing the anchor-OFF crater). The PCB1 postcode binary is built from the WOF postcode shard (per locale's country code); the gazetteer lexicon is the codex-generated repo file. Paths under `db` are relative to weights.dataRoot/wof. Like the weights binaries, these are skipped in CI (MAILWOMAN_SKIP_WEIGHTS_COPY) — the publish workflow places them via the HF fetch step.

pairIndexByCountry.$comment: The placetype-pair-prior arc's PIX1 retrieval index (placetype-pair-prior arc, Task 3/8) — mirrors postcodeDBByCountry's shape exactly, but the source is a CSV of (child, parent) tuples rather than a WOF DB, and `--delta` is a REQUIRED calibrated value (no default — see `mailwoman gazetteer pair-index --help`). `source` is relative to weights.dataRoot (NOT weights.dataRoot/wof, unlike postcodeDBByCountry). COUNTRY-SPECIFIC BY DESIGN, same as the runtime resolver (neural/weights.ts's resolvePairIndexSibling): a locale with no entry here simply ships no pair-index sibling and the prior stays inert for it.

assets.$comment: Where the model release lives for the demo + the CI weights pull. The release path embeds `version`; publish.yml derives the same path from the model card so CI and local stay in sync.
